footer.tagline: Fresh wraps, salads and good coffee, made with care.

hero.title: Wraps & Coffee
hero.slogan: We offer fresh salads, tasty wraps, baguettes and a varied selection of drinks.
hero.description: Quality ingredients, prepared fresh every day in a cozy spot to slow down, meet friends or grab something good on the go.

menu.title: What's on the menu
menu.intro: A little bit of everything, made fresh to order.

salads.title: Salads
salads.description: Crisp, colourful salads tossed with fresh greens, seasonal veg and your choice of toppings.

wraps.title: Wraps
wraps.description: Soft wraps rolled with rice, fresh vegetables and your choice of filling.

baguettes.title: Baguettes
baguettes.description: Crusty baguettes with fresh salad and your choice of filling.

pizza.title: Pizza
pizza.description: Stone-baked pizza slices with classic and seasonal toppings.

nachos.title: Nacho Plates
nachos.description: Crunchy nachos loaded with cheese, salsa and guacamole, perfect for sharing.

drinks.title: Coffee & Drinks
drinks.description: Espresso-based coffee, tea and other drinks to go with your meal.

smoothies.title: Smoothies
smoothies.description: Fresh fruit smoothies, blended to order.

location.title: Find us
location.intro: Stop by our cafe in Oslo — see the map below for directions.

events.title: Events
events.intro: A few of the things happening at Wraps & Coffee. Come hang out!

poetryNight.title: Weekly Poetry Night
poetryNight.description: Bring your own poems or just come to listen. Coffee and good company guaranteed.

movieNight.title: Movie Nights
movieNight.description: Cozy screenings of feel-good films with snacks and warm drinks.

liveMusic.title: Live Acoustic Sessions
liveMusic.description: Local musicians play relaxed acoustic sets while you enjoy dinner.

coffeeTasting.title: Coffee Tasting Workshop
coffeeTasting.description: A guided tasting through our favourite beans and brewing methods.

footer.tagline: Ferske wraps, salater og god kaffe, laget med omtanke.

hero.title: Wraps & Coffee
hero.slogan: Vi tilbyr friske salater, smakfulle wraps, baguetter og et variert utvalg drikke.
hero.description: Kvalitetsråvarer, tilberedt ferskt hver dag, i et koselig lokale hvor du kan slappe av, møte venner eller ta med deg noe godt på farten.

menu.title: Dette finner du på menyen
menu.intro: Litt av hvert, laget ferskt når du bestiller.

salads.description: Sprø og fargerike salater med ferske grønnsaker, sesongråvarer og valgfrie tilbehør.

baguettes.description: Sprø baguetter med fersk salat og ditt valg av fyll.

pizza.description: Steinovnsbakte pizzastykker med klassiske og sesongbaserte topping.

nachos.title: Nachoplater
nachos.description: Sprø nachos med ost, salsa og guacamole — perfekt å dele.

drinks.title: Kaffe & Drikke
drinks.description: Espressobasert kaffe, te og andre drikker som passer til måltidet.

smoothies.title: Smoothies
smoothies.description: Friske fruktsmoothies, blandet ferskt til deg.

location.intro: Stikk innom kafeen vår i Oslo — se kartet under for veibeskrivelse.
